title: Lovely Gooey German Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful German beef stew featuring tender beef, root vegetables, and a rich herbal broth, perfect for a romantic date night dinner
instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium high heat
Add the beef cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes
Add the chopped onion, carrots, potatoes, and celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes
Add the beef broth, tomato paste, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours
Stir in the red food coloring and continue to simmer for an additional 30 minutes
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired
Let the stew rest for 10 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together
